name: adlc-team
description: Agentic Development Lifecycle v7.1 — Team edition. 3 role-based agents (BA/DEV/QA) with platform enforcement, 8 skills (smart-start, BA: 1, DEV: 3, Shared: 2) + 3 deprecated redirects, GitHub Projects integration. v7.1: Token optimization — stripped duplicate spawn prompts (~40% reduction), merged 3 start skills into smart-start. Requires companion plugins: pr-review-toolkit, commit-commands. Recommended: claude-md-management, context7, github, LSP for your stack.
